price: Sie sagten: „Nein! Vielmehr fanden wir (bereits) unsere Väter desgleichen tun.
arabic: قَالُواْ بَلۡ وَجَدۡنَآ ءَابَآءَنَا كَذَٰلِكَ يَفۡعَلُونَ

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: qālū bal wajadnā ābāanā kadhālika yafʿalūna
